title: Subirrigazione con digestato microfiltrato per risparmiare acqua, energia e concimi
description: A technical presentation of the SOS_AQUAE project demonstrating the use of microfiltered digestate in subsurface drip irrigation to optimize water, energy, and fertilizer use. It summarizes agronomic trials, nutrient management strategies, and sustainable fertilization techniques under the Emilia-Romagna rural development programme.
